osx.command: if [ ! -d ".venv" ]; then python3 -m venv .venv; fi && source .venv/bin/activate && cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000

linux.command: if [ ! -d ".venv" ]; then python3 -m venv .venv; fi && source .venv/bin/activate && cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000

windows.command: if (!(Test-Path ".venv")) { python -m venv .venv } ; .\.venv\Scripts\activate ; cd backend ; pip install -r requirements.txt ; python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000

tasks.label: Start Frontend
tasks.command: cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev

windows.command: cd frontend ; npm install ; npm run dev
